.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-node-container .markdown-rendere.background: linear-gradient(rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.03) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / 20px 20px padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.03) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / 20px 20px padding-box border-box

.math-block.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(156, 122, 153, 0.05) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 50%, rgba(156, 122, 153, 0.02) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.math-block::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag::before.background: rgb(213, 196, 161) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(29, 32, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(156, 122, 153) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.footnote-backref.footnote-link::before.background: rgb(189, 174, 147) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.internal-link.is-unresolved[data-href=.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(232, 216, 163) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.internal-link[data-href=\"callouts\"][.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(176, 108, 90) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(232, 216, 163) 0%, rgba(232, 216, 163, 0.8) 25%, rgba(232, 216, 163, 0.4) 75%, rgba(232, 216, 163, 0.2) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #3c3836 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#3c3836, color-mix(in srgb, #3c3836 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #3c3836 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#3c3836, color-mix(in srgb, #3c3836 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(29, 32, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body::before.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #3c3836 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#3c3836, color-mix(in srgb, #3c3836 65%, transparent))
body::before.--font-default: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body::before.--font-monospace-default: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
body::before.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #3c3836 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#3c3836, color-mix(in srgb, #3c3836 65%, transparent))
body::before.--raised-mask: linear-gradient(white, white) padding-box, linear-gradient(white, white) border-box
body::before.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
body::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px, rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.03) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 2px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / 100% 2px padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(29, 32, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px, rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.03) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 2px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / 100% 2px padding-box border-box

code::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 2px, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.02) 2px, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.02) 4px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

del.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(176, 108, 90, 0.05) 0%, rgba(176, 108, 90, 0.1) 50%, rgba(176, 108, 90, 0.05) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

del::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

del::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0%, rgb(176, 108, 90) 20%, rgb(176, 108, 90) 80%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgba(107, 140, 164, 0.02) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 30%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout-content::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout-content::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) radial-gradient(circle, rgba(107, 140, 164, 0.02) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / 20px 20px padding-box border-box

div.callout-title.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(107, 140, 164, 0.3) 0%, rgba(107, 140, 164, 0.15) 50%, rgba(107, 140, 164, 0.05) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout-title-inner::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li.task-list-item[data-line=\"0\"][data-.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(232, 216, 163, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.05) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6) 20%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) 80%, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.03) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
pre.box-shadow: rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.1) 0px 0px 20px 0px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 0px 40px 0px inset, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.2) 0px 0px 15px 0px, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.1) 0px 0px 30px 0px

pre::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.8) 0%, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.6) 30%, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.4) 70%, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.6) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.05) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6) 20%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) 80%, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.03) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
pre.language-js.box-shadow: rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.1) 0px 0px 20px 0px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 0px 40px 0px inset, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.2) 0px 0px 15px 0px, rgba(122, 143, 113, 0.1) 0px 0px 30px 0px

pre.language-js::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(107, 140, 164, 0.8) 0%, rgba(107, 140, 164, 0.6) 30%, rgba(107, 140, 164, 0.4) 70%, rgba(107, 140, 164, 0.6) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

table.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(156, 122, 153, 0.05) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 50%, rgba(232, 216, 163, 0.02) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

table::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

table::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) radial-gradient(circle at 2px 2px, rgba(232, 216, 163, 0.03) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / 20px 20px padding-box border-box

th.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(232, 216, 163, 0.2) 0%, rgba(232, 216, 163, 0.1) 50%, rgba(232, 216, 163, 0.05) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
